properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v1 v4 v3 v5 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Na, na, na, na, na Na, na, na, na, na Na, na, na, na, na

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Oh, I was a dead man walking on a dead end road Just a soul free falling with no place to go I heard Jesus knocking and He called me home Now His Spirit's living deep inside these bones

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I've got resurrection blood flowing in my veins Flowing in my veins I found resurrection life in a hollow grave In a hollow grave I see resurrection power when I speak Your name When I speak Your name I've got resurrection blood flowing in my veins Flowing in my veins

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Oh, all my chains went falling when He saved my soul All my fears went running from the Holy Ghost Hallelujah all my sins are white as snow Now my freedom's anchored in that crimson's flow

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: See that stone rolled away see that conquered empty grave Demons flee darkness shakes at the sound of Jesus' name No more fear no more shame by His death my debt is paid Now I rise now I'm changed I'm alive in Jesus' name
